title: Ecom Express is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Ecom Express is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
